news.title: Faculty respond to +AI initiative
news.summary_en: After the launch of the provost office’s +AI academic initiative to integrate AI into the classroom, divisions continue to ensue concerning AI and opinions on the University’s largely positive position on the technology.
news.author: Lexi Lawsky

news.title: SU FY27 budget increases overall student group funding, cuts major programming
news.summary_en: In February this year, Student Union (SU) approved its fiscal year 2027 (FY27) general budget of approximately $4.8 million, an increase from about $4.65 million allocated for FY26. For the upcoming fiscal year, more funding will be directed towards student groups compared to FY26.
news.author: Pranathi Murthy

news.title: Amanda Nguyen – “an astronaut, a scientist, and an activist” – speaks at WashU
news.summary_en: For someone who’s been to space, Amanda Nguyen is incredibly down to earth. Nguyen, a sexual assault advocate and the first Vietnamese woman to go to space, spoke about her journey during a fireside chat on Thursday, April 16.
news.author: Flannery Poon

news.title: Changes to McKelvey PhD admissions bring an end to lab rotations
news.summary_en: All of McKelvey’s PhD programs have transitioned away from rotational admissions this year, moving to a fully direct-admit model where incoming PhD students are matched with a single faculty advisor before setting foot on campus. The shift mirrors a broader national trend driven largely by one factor: funding.
news.author: Ella Giere
